name: Golf Headquarters of Williamsville
about: The Dome is an indoor golf and entertainment venue located in Williamsville, NY, featuring Toptracer technology for year-round practice and play. It offers a comprehensive experience including 50 practice stalls on two levels, club fitting services with TrackMan and SAM PuttLab, and a full kitchen and bar. The facility is designed for golfers of all skill levels, with amenities ranging from individual practice to large group events and corporate outings.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Toptracer technology for advanced game analysis
Year-round indoor practice facility with heated 68,000 sq. ft. dome
Comprehensive amenities including dining, pro shop, and event spaces

food_and_drink.notes: Two Nines Kitchen Bar offers full food service with varying hours by season
Full bar service available at Two Nines Kitchen Bar

simulator_hardware.notes: 33 hitting bays with Toptracer technology for games and stat tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but rentals may be available. Contact The Dome directly for equipment rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full kitchen and bar service through Two Nines Kitchen Bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on group size and simulator usage. The Toptracer system allows for efficient play.

faq.question: Is The Dome kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Dome is family-friendly with activities suitable for all ages, including junior golf programs and family entertainment options.
